## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager screen for Full Stack Engineer (Product focus) position at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Daniel provided an in-depth overview of growthx.ai's products, tech stack, and future plans](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=3807.0)
  - [Jacopo has extensive Rails experience from 37signals but is open to learning new technologies like React/TypeScript](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=3430.0)
  - [Time zone overlap (3-4 hours daily with PST) may be challenging but workable](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=6441.0)
  - [growthx.ai is building AI-powered content creation/marketing tools with plans to expand offerings](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=3807.0)

## Topics

### Company Overview

  - [growthx.ai bootstrapped to $3M revenue by Jan 2023, then raised $12M Series A](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=3905.0)
  - [Building AI-powered content creation and marketing tools](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=3807.0)
  - [Currently focused on enterprise clients ($150-200K/year contracts)](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=6098.0)
  - [Plans to expand to self-serve options and open source frameworks](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=6071.0)

### Product Overview

  - [AI-powered content creation platform for marketers](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=4392.0)
  - [Workflows for research, drafting, editing, image generation](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=4742.0)
  - [Analytics integration (Google Search Console, etc)](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=5611.0)
  - [AI visibility tool to track company mentions/rankings in AI responses](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=5713.0)
  - [Open source framework for building AI workflows planned](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=6324.0)

### Tech Stack

  - [Rails backend](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=2245.0)
  - [React/TypeScript frontend](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=2279.0)
  - [Inertia.js for server-side rendering](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=2401.0)
  - [Custom TypeScript framework on top of Temporal for AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=4942.0)
  - [Aiming to standardize on "Basecamp-style" Rails practices](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=3430.0)

### Team Structure

  - [\~15 engineers across product and AI framework teams](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=2126.0)
  - [Mix of full-stack, frontend, and backend roles](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=3807.0)
  - [Some remote/distributed team members](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

### Role Expectations

  - [Full-stack development, leaning more towards backend/Rails](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Help standardize Rails practices across codebase](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=3430.0)
  - [Learn and contribute to React/TypeScript frontend](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=3430.0)
  - [Potential to work on open source AI framework](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=3583.0)

### Work Schedule

  - [3-4 hours daily overlap with PST desired](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=6441.0)
  - [Weekly team sync meeting (30-60 min)](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=6649.0)
  - [Bi-weekly all-hands meeting](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=6639.0)
  - [1:1s every 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=6723.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Daniel to discuss with Tucker (presumably another team member)](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=6788.0)
  - [Daniel to follow up with Jacopo on next steps in hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=6788.0)
  - [Jacopo to send any additional questions via email](https://fathom.video/share/sunUwg9_r2XeA-5m9aV3T8DPgaafWEo1?tab=summary&timestamp=6788.0)
